get.summary: Academic Credentials 6.0 - Returns resources from STVDPLM and STVDEGC
get.description:
### Academic Credentials 6.0 - Returns resources from STVDPLM and STVDEGC

Returns a paged listing of all the academic credential records from STVDPLM and STVDEGC tables.

The academic credential records of type diploma are retrieved from STVDPLM table. The academic credential records of type degree, honorary and certificate are retrieved from STVDEGC table.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/academic-credentials-6.0.0/academic-credentials.yaml

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of resources requesting for this result set. Default page limit is 500 and upper limit is 1000.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The 0 based index for a collection of resources for the page requested.

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Type  
Returns all academic credentials for the specific credential type i.e. degree, honorary, diploma, certificate passed.
```
/api/academic-credentials?type=degree
```

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

x-postman-request-names: Academic Credentials 6.0 - Returns resources from STVDPLM and STVDEGC

post.summary: Academic Credentials 6.0 - Create a new resource in STVDPLM and STVDEGC
post.description:
### Academic Credentials 6.0 - Create a new resource in STVDPLM and STVDEGC

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

In addition to the required properties defined in the data model, the following are required for a POST request: abbreviation

Creates a new academic credentials record.

If 'type' property in the POST request is sent as diploma, then the academic credential record in created in STVDPLM table. If 'type' property in the POST request is sent as degree, honorary or certificate, then the academic credential record in created in STVDEGC table.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/academic-credentials-6.0.0/academic-credentials.yaml

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

### Academic Disciplines 15.0 - Create a new resource in STVMAJR

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new academic discipline record in STVMAJR table

Below is the API behavior details for reporting property on a create request:

Reporting:

- 'reporting' property is accepted only if STVMAJR_CIPC_CODE is sent in the create request.
- The reporting country codes supported in the API are USA and CAN. Create request will be rejected with an error message if country code does not match USA or CAN.
- The reporting country code sent in the request should match the home institution country code in GUBINST_ NATN_CODE. Create request will be rejected with an error message if the reported country code sent in request does not match the GUBINST_NATN_CODE.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/academic-disciplines-15.0.0/academic-disciplines.yaml

---

get.summary: Academic Periods 16.0.0 - Returns resources
get.description:
### Academic Periods 16.0.0 - Returns resources

Returns a paged listing of all the academic period records of category year, term and subterm.

The year records are retrieved from STVACYR table, the term records are retrieved from STVTERM table, the subterm records of type part of term are retrieved from STVPTRM table and subterm records with Open Learning rules are retrieved from SOBODTE table.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/academic-periods-16.0.0/academic-periods.yaml

---

### Academic Periods 16.1.0 - Returns resources

Returns a paged listing of all the academic period records of category year, term and subterm.

The year records are retrieved from STVACYR table, the term records are retrieved from STVTERM table, the subterm records of type part of term are retrieved from STVPTRM table and subterm records with Open Learning rules are retrieved from SOBODTE table.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/academic-periods-16.1.0/academic-periods.yaml

---

### Academic Periods 8.0 - Return all resources

This version of the resource uses a legacy filter format and cannot be displayed as a parameter.  Please refer to the API source documentation for more information.

Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/academic-periods-8.0.0/academic-periods.yaml

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Registration  
Returns all academic periods for the registration passed.
```
/academic-periods?criteria={"registration":"open"}
```
### Code  
Returns all academic periods for the code passed.
```
/academic-periods?criteria={"code":"201410"}
```
### Category Type  
Returns all academic periods for the category passed.
```
/academic-periods?criteria={"category":{"type":"term"}}
```

parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

get.summary: Account Funds Available 8.0 - Return all resources
get.description:
### Account Funds Available 8.0 - Return all resources

The API validates an accounting string for a transaction in progress and optionally confirms that the accounting string has sufficient budget for the amount being entered. 

### accountingString and amount filters are required in the URL for the GET request to work
```
  /api/account-funds-available?accountSpecification={"accountingString":{accountingString},"amount":{amount}}
```


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/account-funds-available-8.0.0/account-funds-available.yaml

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of resources requesting for this result set.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The 0 based index for a collection of resources for the page requested.

parameters.name: accountSpecification
parameters.description:
### accountingString and amount  
Filter on accountingString and amount is mandatory for the API to return a respone. Following example shows how to invoke the API with the filters needed.
```
  /api/account-funds-available?accountSpecification={"accountingString":"^|B^|LRACC2^|^|126^|5900^|23^|100^|01^|AMRTEST1^|DAXC^|01^|","amount":"50"}
```
### balanceOn  
```
  /api/account-funds-available?accountSpecification={"accountingString":"^|B^|LRACC2^|^|126^|5900^|23^|100^|01^|AMRTEST1^|DAXC^|01^|","amount":"50","balanceOn":"2016-11-23T07:18:23Zss"}
```

post.summary: Account Funds Available Transactions 11.1.0 - Checks for the availability of funds
post.description:
### Account Funds Available Transactions 11.1.0 - Checks for the availability of funds

This is a QAPI and requires a /qapi in the route.

The API allows the user to check on the availability of funds for all accounts involved in one or more transactions taking into account the net effect of the transactions.

This QAPI supports below transaction types
- travelEncumbranceCreate
- travelEncumbranceAdjust
- requisitions
- purchase order (create order)
- purchase order (change order)
- travelExpense
- otherInvoice

Returns all accounting accounting string component value records from FTVFTYP table in the system.

Note:

• Map Level 1 fund type codes from FTVFTYP_FTYP_CODE_PRED column in FUND.COMPONENT.TYPE configuration setting to get type.fund property for fund records.

• Map Level 1 account type codes from FTVATYP_ATYP_CODE_PRED column in ACCOUNT.COMPONENT.TYPE configuration setting to get type.account property for account records.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/accounting-string-component-values-15.0.0/accounting-string-component-values.yaml

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Component  
Accounting string component used in the accounting string.
```
/accounting-string-component-values?criteria={"component":{"id":"662ad735-4d8d-4689-907e-47e163234657"}}
```
### Transaction Status  
Indicates if accounting string component value is available for transaction entry.
```
/accounting-string-component-values?criteria={"transactionStatus":"available"}
```
### Account Type  
Filter based on the type of account of the component.
```
/accounting-string-component-values?criteria={"type":{"account":"expense"}}
```
### Fund Type  
Filter based on the type of fund of account component.
```
/accounting-string-component-values?criteria={"type":{"fund":"studentLoan"}}
```
### Status  
The status of the accounting string component value (active or inactive).
```
/accounting-string-component-values?criteria={"status":"active"}
```
### Grants  
The grant(s) associated with the accounting string component value.
```
/accounting-string-component-values?criteria={"grants":[{"id":"b62ad735-4d8d-4689-907e-47e163234647"}]}
```

parameters.name: effectiveOn
parameters.description:
### Effective On  
Filter to return all records effective on a given date.
```
/accounting-string-component-values?effectiveOn={"effectiveOn":"2015-08-29"}
```

This version of the resource uses a legacy filter format and cannot be displayed as a parameter.  Please refer to the API source documentation for more information.

### accountingString filter is required in the URL for the GET request to work
```
  /api/account-funds-available?accountingString={accountingString}
```

NOTE 

  - If validOn date is sent in filter criteria, the API validates accounting string components according to the date sent in request.

post.summary: Accounts Payable Invoices 11.1.0 - Create a new resource in FABINVH
post.description:
### Accounts Payable Invoices 11.1.0 - Create a new resource in FABINVH

Creates a direct pay or a travel type invoice or a procurement and eProcurement type invoice in FABINVH. If a create request is sent with type as procurement or eProcurement, the API creates a regular invoice record in FABINVH. If a create request is sent with type as travel will create a general encumbrance invoice record in FABINVH. A create request sent without 'type' will create a direct pay invoice. Though the lineItems.accountDetails.sequenceNumber is an optional property, the right sequence number values for the General Encumbrance that match up with the FOAPALs stored in Banner for the general encumbrance sequence numbers are to be sent in the request so that the right enumbrance sequence is liquidated by the invoice as expected. 

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/accounts-payable-invoices-11.1.0/accounts-payable-invoices.yaml

---

### Accounts Payable Invoices 16.0.0 - Create a new resource in FABINVH

Creates a direct pay or a travel type invoice or a procurement and eProcurement type invoice in FABINVH. If a create request is sent with type as travel will create a general encumbrance invoice record in FABINVH. A create request sent without 'type' will create a direct pay invoice. Though the lineItems.accountDetails.sequenceNumber is an optional property, the right sequence number values for the General Encumbrance that match up with the FOAPALs stored in Banner for the general encumbrance sequence numbers are to be sent in the request so that the right enumbrance sequence is liquidated by the invoice as expected. 

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/admission-applications-11.0.0/admission-applications.yaml

---

### Admission Applications Submissions 1.0.0 - Create a new resource in SARADAP

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

In addition to the required properties defined in the data model, the following are required for a POST request: academicPeriod.id

Creates a admission applicant record in the SARADAP table, creates associated curriculum records in SORLCUR, and associated field of study – major, minor and concentration records in SORLFOS. Only active and current ADMISSION SORLCUR records are created. Institution-enabled validations are performed based on the configurations in curriculum checkings, SOACTRL page and the curriculum rules, SOACURR page.

The API response conforms to the admission-applications data model.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/admission-applications-submissions-1.0.0/admission-applications-submissions.yaml

---

### Admission Applications Submissions 1.1.0 - Create a new resource in SARADAP

Creates a admission applicant record in the SARADAP table, creates associated curriculum records in SORLCUR, and associated field of study – major, minor and concentration records in SORLFOS. Only active and current ADMISSION SORLCUR records are created. Institution-enabled validations are performed based on the configurations in curriculum checkings, SOACTRL page and the curriculum rules, SOACURR page.

The API response conforms to the admission-applications data model.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

In addition to the required properties defined in the data model, the following are required for a POST request: academicPeriod.id

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Application  
Returns all admission decisions for the given application
```
/admission-decisions?criteria={"application":{"id":"42f304c5-4447-4cb0-903d-555a051df1cd"}}
```
### Decided On  
Supported operators are $gte, $lte, or the default of equals if operator is not specified.

Returns all admission decisions for the given date/time.
```
/admission-decisions?criteria={"decidedOn":"2019-04-22T10:03:07+00:00"}
```
```
/admission-decisions?criteria={"decidedOn":{"$eq":"2019-04-22T10:03:07+00:00"}}
```
Returns all admission decisions past the given date/time.
```
/admission-decisions?criteria={"decidedOn":{"$gte":"2019-04-22T10:03:07+00:00"}}
```
Returns all admission decisions before the given date/time.
```
/admission-decisions?criteria={"decidedOn":{"$lte":"2019-04-22T10:03:07+00:00"}}
```

parameters.name: personFilter
parameters.description:
### Person Filter  
Returns all student-academic-periods for personFilter id passed.
```
/admission-decisions?personFilter={"personFilter":{"id":"0925960d-3741-43c0-98eb-b12c6bed5820"}}
```

parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

post.summary: Blanket Purchase Orders 16.0.0 - Create a new resource in FPBPOHD
post.description:
### Blanket Purchase Orders 16.0.0 - Create a new resource in FPBPOHD

Creates a completed blanket purchase order in FPBPOHD with FPBPOHD_PO_TYPE_IND = 'S'.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

In addition to the required properties defined in the data model, the following are required for a POST request: orderDetails.accountDetails.allocation

put.summary: Blanket Purchase Orders 16.0.0 - Update the requested resource from FPBPOHD
put.description:
### Blanket Purchase Orders 16.0.0 - Update the requested resource from FPBPOHD

Updates a blanket purchase order in FPBPOHD with the passed in identifier.

- An update request sent for an outstanding blanket purchase order creates a change order.
- An update request sent with header status 'voided' for an outstanding purchase order will cancel the blanket purchase order and all the associated change orders. 
- Only the document which is completed, approved and posted can be cancelled with an update request.

In addition to the required properties defined in the data model, the following are required for a PUT request: orderDetails.accountDetails.allocation


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/blanket-purchase-orders-16.0.0/blanket-purchase-orders.yaml

get.summary: Courses 16.0.0 - Returns resources from SCBCRSE
get.description:
### Courses 16.0.0 - Returns resources from SCBCRSE

Returns a paged listing of courses records for a unique combination of effective term, subject code and course number.

The course GUIDs are generated and stored in SCBCGID table, for each unique combination of subject code, course number and effective term from SCBCRSE, SCRLEVL, SCRGMOD, SCRSCHD, SCBDESC, SCRINTG, SCRSYLN and SCRATTR tables. All records from SCBCGID are retrieved.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/courses-16.0.0/courses.yaml

---

### Courses 16.1.0 - Returns resources from SCBCRSE

Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/courses-16.1.0/courses.yaml

---

### Courses 16.2.0 - Returns resources from SCBCRSE

Returns a paged listing of courses records for a unique combination of effective term, subject code and course number.

The course GUIDs are generated and stored in SCBCGID table, for each unique combination of subject code, course number and effective term from SCBCRSE, SCRLEVL, SCRGMOD, SCRSCHD, SCBDESC, SCRINTG, SCRSYLN and SCRATTR tables. All records from SCBCGID are retrieved.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of resources requesting for this result set. Default page limit is 10 and upper limit is 30.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The 0 based index for a collection of resources for the page requested.

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Title Value  
Returns all courses containing the titles values passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"titles":[{"value":$value}]}
```
### Subject  
Returns all courses for the subject ID passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"subject": {"id": $id}}
```
### Topic  
Not Supported
```
/courses?criteria={"topic": {"id": $id}}
```
### Categories  
Returns all courses for the categories ID passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"categories": [{"id": $id}]}
```
### Number  
Returns all courses for the course number passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"number": $number}
```
### Academic Levels  
Returns all courses for the academic level ID passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"academicLevels": [{"id": $id}]}
```
### Owning Institution Units  
Returns all courses for the owningInstitutionUnits IDs passed. A Banner course can have one college, one division and one department associated. If a filter request has multiple college/division/department IDs, an empty array is returned.
```
/courses?criteria={"owningInstitutionUnits":[{"institutionUnit":{"id":$id}}]}
```
### Instructional Method  
Returns all courses for the instructional method(schedule type) ID passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"instructionalMethodDetails":[{"instructionalMethod":{"id":$id}}]}
```
### Scheduling Start On  
Returns all courses for the schedulingStartOn date passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"schedulingStartOn:": $schedulingStartOn}
```
### Scheduling End On  
Returns all courses for the schedulingEndOn date passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"schedulingEndOn:": $schedulingEndOn}
```
### Administrative Period  
Returns all courses for the effective term ID passed.
```
/courses?criteria={"administrativePeriod": {"id": $id}}
```

parameters.name: activeOn
parameters.description:
### Active On  
Returns all course records that have a status that identifies the course as active and effective as of the provided date.
```
/courses?activeOn={"activeOn": $activeOn}
```

parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

post.summary: Courses 16.0.0 - Create a new resource in SCBCRSE
post.description:
### Courses 16.0.0 - Create a new resource in SCBCRSE

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new course record in SCBCRSE.

Below are the API behavior details for titles, owningInstitutionUnits, administrativePeriod and credits properties on a create request:

Titles:

- The API accepts 2 types of titles - short title and long title of the course.
- The course short title sent in the request should not exceed 30 characters, similarly the course long title sent in the request should not exceed 100 characters.

Owning Institution Units:

- Banner can only accommodate one college, one division, and one department entry. If more than one owning institution unit of each type is sent in the owningIntitutionUnits array, the request is requested with an error message.
- The course must be defined with a college code. If owningIntitutionUnits property is sent in the create request without college GUID, the request is requested with an error message.The 'ownershipPercentage' value sent in the request should be 100, if any other value is sent then the request is rejected with an error message

Administrative Period:

- If administrative period ID is sent in the create request, the course is created for the effective term corresponding to this ID.
- If administrative period ID is not sent in the create request, the course effective term is derived for the scheduling start date sent. Based on the ‘MIN’ or ‘MAX’ value configured in the API configuration setting ‘COURSE.DERIVE_TERM_RULE’, either of the ‘DERIVE_MAX_TERM’ OR ‘DERIVE_MIN_TERM’ GORRSQL rule is used to derive the effective term for the scheduling start date sent.
- If both administrative period ID and scheduling start date are not sent in the create request, the course is created for the default effective term configured in the API configuration setting ‘COURSE.TERM.DEFAULT’.

Credits:

- Only 'ce' and 'institution' credit categories are supported
- A create request with credit category of 'institution' should be sent with credit measure of 'hour'. Similarly the credit category of 'ce' should be sent with credit measure of 'ceu'.
- If the credit category sent in the create request is 'ce', then one of the academic levels sent in the request should have SCBCRSE_CEU_IND = 'Y'

The properties 'topic' and 'courseLevels' are not supported. Create request sent with these properties will be rejected with an error message.

get.summary: Currencies 1.0.0 - Returns resources from GTVCURR
get.description:
### Currencies 1.0.0 - Returns resources from GTVCURR

Returns a paged listing of currency records from GTVCURR table.

The API retrieves a single record per currency code as defined below:

- For the currency code, retrieve the record  that is currently effective.
- If there is no record currently effective for the currency code then retrieve the first future effective dated record.
- If there is no currently effective or future dated record for the currency code then retrieve the recent past record.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/currencies-1.0.0/currencies.yaml

put.description:
### Currencies 1.0.0 - Update the requested resource from GTVCURR

Updates the existing currency record from GTVCURR table.

- If there are any future dated records existing for the currency sent in request, the API rejects with an error message
-  For every update request with a currency code, the API creates a duplicate of the maximum effective dated record of the currency and updates the effective date as system date. The next change date of the original record will be updated with system date.

If the API configuration setting 'CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD' is mapped to the value 'STVSBGIFICECODE' then the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from the STVSBGI_FICE field and if the setting to mapped to the value 'STVSBGICODE' then the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from STVSBGI_CODE field and if the setting to mapped to the value 'N' then the API does not retrieve the standardizedCodes property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/educational-institutions-6.1.0/educational-institutions.yaml

---

### Educational Institutions 6.2.0 - Returns resources from GOBINST and STVSBGI

The API retrieves a paged listing of home institutions from the GUBINST table and external institutions from the STVSBGI table.
If the API configuration setting CEEB.CODE.GORSBGT.FIELD is mapped to the value 'Y', then the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from the GORSBGT_VALUE field, provided corresponding GORSBGT_SBGT_CODE has a value set to CEEB defined (hardcoded)

 -If the setting is mapped to the value 'N', then the configuration specified in CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD determines the source of the CEEB code:

 -If CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD is mapped to 'STVSBGIFICECODE', the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from the STVSBGI_FICE field.

 -If CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD is mapped to 'STVSBGICODE', the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from the STVSBGI_CODE field.

 -If CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD is mapped to 'N', the API does not retrieve the standardizedCodes property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/educational-institutions-6.2.0/educational-institutions.yaml

---

### Educational Institutions 6.3.0 - Returns resources from GOBINST and STVSBGI

The API retrieves a paged listing of home institutions from the GUBINST table and external institutions from the STVSBGI table.
If the API configuration setting CEEB.CODE.GORSBGT.FIELD is mapped to the value 'Y', then the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from the GORSBGT_VALUE field, provided corresponding GORSBGT_SBGT_CODE has a value set to CEEB defined (hardcoded)

 -If the setting is mapped to the value 'N', then the configuration specified in CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD determines the source of the CEEB code:

 -If CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD is mapped to 'STVSBGIFICECODE', the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from the STVSBGI_FICE field.

 -If CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD is mapped to 'STVSBGICODE', the API retrieves the standardizedCodes.country.ceeb property from the STVSBGI_CODE field.

 -If CEEB.CODE.SOURCE.FIELD is mapped to 'N', the API does not retrieve the standardizedCodes property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/educational-institutions-6.3.0/educational-institutions.yaml

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Person  
Returns all employees for the given person
```
/employees?criteria={"person":{"id":"ed3ebe29-e501-4917-92f9-59b202b482aa"}}
```
### Campus  
Returns all employees for the given campus
```
/employees?criteria={"campus":{"id":"b1156e7a-cea5-4e24-9fa2-bf8a367f2c61"}}
```
### Contract Type  
Returns all employees for the given contract
```
/employees?criteria={"contract":{"type":"fullTime"}}
```
### Status  
Returns all employees for the given status
```
/employees?criteria={"status":"terminated"}
```
### Start On  
Returns all employees for the given startOn
```
/employees?criteria={"startOn":"2003-04-25"}
```
### End On  
Returns all employees for the given endOn
```
/employees?criteria={"endOn":"2019-02-02"}
```
### Contract Detail  
Not Supported
```
/employees?criteria={"contract":{"detail":$detail}}
```

post.summary: Employees 12.0 - Create a new resource in PEBEMPL
post.description:
### Employees 12.0 - Create a new resource in PEBEMPL

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates an employee record in PEBEMPL table with a POST request.

Note:

- The API creates an employee record only if the person id sent in request has the following data - At least one address, First name, SSN/SIN, Gender, Date of Birth, Ethnicity
- For a POST request with contract.type = contractual, the API rejects the request as only contract.type of fullTime and partTime are supported.
- The API only supports the POST request with status=active to create an employee record.
- The API does not support leave processing currently and if any POST requests with status=leave is sent will be rejected.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/employees-12.0.0/employees.yaml

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

get.summary: Financial Aid Application Outcomes 9.0 - Returns resources from RCRAPP1
get.description:
### Financial Aid Application Outcomes 9.0 - Returns resources from RCRAPP1

Returns a paged listing of all the institutional and federal financial aid application results from RCRAPP1 table.

The institutional applications are the RCRAPP1 records with Information Source Code (RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE ) as CSS or MANUAL and RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO = 0.

The federal applications are the RCRAPP1 records with RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE as EDE or MANUAL, RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO > 0 and RCRAPP1_CURR_REC_IND = 'Y'. The current record of EDE application is published.

The API does not retrieve the RCRAPP1 records with RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE = MANUAL and RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO = -1. These are the records which hold noncustodial parent information and are considered an extension of the RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO = 0 record. The API does not support RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE = 'CAL' records.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/financial-aid-application-outcomes-9.0.0/financial-aid-application-outcomes.yaml

---

### Financial Aid Application Outcomes 9.1.0 - Returns resources from RCRAPP1

Returns a paged listing of all the institutional and federal financial aid application results from RCRAPP1 table.

The institutional applications are the RCRAPP1 records with Information Source Code (RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE ) as CSS or MANUAL and RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO = 0.

The federal applications are the RCRAPP1 records with RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE as EDE or MANUAL, RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO > 0 and RCRAPP1_CURR_REC_IND = 'Y'. The current record of EDE application is published.

The API does not retrieve the RCRAPP1 records with RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE = MANUAL and RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO = -1. These are the records which hold noncustodial parent information and are considered an extension of the RCRAPP1_SEQ_NO = 0 record. The API does not support RCRAPP1_INFC_CODE = 'CAL' records.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/financial-aid-application-outcomes-9.1.0/financial-aid-application-outcomes.yaml

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Code  
The code that identifies the financial aid fund.
```
/financial-aid-funds?criteria={"code":"FWS"}
```
### Source  
The source of the financial aid fund (federal, state, institutional, other).
```
/financial-aid-funds?criteria={"source":"institutional"}
```
### Aid Type  
Type of the financial aid fund (loan, grant, scholarship, work).
```
/financial-aid-funds?criteria={"aidType":"grant"}
```
### Classifications  
The classifications assigned to the financial aid fund.
```
/financial-aid-funds?criteria={"classifications":[{"id":"9c2ca670-72c0-40c6-a978-2c8cb4a19915"}]}
```
### Category Name  
Name of the financial aid fund category.
```
/financial-aid-funds?criteria={"category":{"name":"pellGrant"}}
```
### Category Detail  
The extension to the category of the financial aid fund.
```
/financial-aid-funds?criteria={"category":{"detail":{"id":"b8a7f335-260d-462e-a3a8-5cc4c23c2b1e"}}}
```

get.summary: Fixed Assets 12.0 - Return all resources from FFBMAST
get.description:
### Fixed Assets 12.0 - Return all resources from FFBMAST

Returns a paged listing of all the fixed asset records from FFBMAST table.

Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/fixed-assets-12.0.0/fixed-assets.yaml

---

### Fixed Assets 12.1.0 - Return all or selected resources from FFBMAST

Returns a paged listing of all the fixed asset records from the FFBMAST table, or using one of five parameter options returns a paged listing for the selected fixed asset record(s).

Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/fixed-assets-12.1.0/fixed-assets.yaml

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of resources requesting for this result set. Default page limit is 500 and upper limit is 1000.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The 0 based index for a collection of resources for the page requested.

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Description Returns all fixed asset records for a given "description". The value for a "description" is case insensitive, and criteria values with wildcard(s) are supported. ``` /fixed-assets?criteria={"description": "%Minolta%"} ``` ### Last Inventory Date The property "lastInventoryOn" corresponds to the data element FFBMAST_LAST_INVENTORY_DATE in the Asset Master record. Supported operators are Greater Than or Equal, Less Than or Equal, or a given date value.

The following returns all fixed asset records with last inventoried date equal to the given date: ``` /fixed-assets?criteria={"lastInventoryOn": "2025-09-20"} ``` The following returns all fixed asset records with last inventoried date greater than or equal to the given date: ``` /fixed-assets?criteria={"lastInventoryOn":{"$gte": "2020-01-01"}} ``` The following returns all fixed asset records with last inventoried date less than or equal to the given date: ``` /fixed-assets?criteria={"lastInventoryOn":{"$lte": "2019-12-31"}} ``` ### Permanent Tag or Origination Tag Returns a fixed asset record for a given Ptag value if a matching Ptag exists, or can return the fixed asset record for a given Otag value (if there is no Ptag in the Asset Master FFBMAST using the same Ptag number as the given Otag number).

When the given "tag" value is an Otag number, the "tag" property value returned is the related Ptag number if a Ptag exists for the given Otag, otherwise the given Otag value is returned. ``` /fixed-assets?criteria={"tag": "N00009901"} ```

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

post.summary: General Ledger Transactions 12.0 - Create a new resource
post.description:
### General Ledger Transactions 12.0 - Create a new resource

Create a new resource

Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/general-ledger-transactions-12.0.0/general-ledger-transactions.yaml

---

### General Ledger Transactions 12.1.0 - Create a new resource

Creates a record in GURFEED or FGBJVCD table based on the processMode value sent in the request.

Note:

• A create request sent with processMode='updateImmediate' supports only single transaction type and with processMode='updateBatch' supports multiple transaction types.

• A create request sent with processMode='validate', the API only validates the request data and returns a 201 created response status upon successful validation.

• A create request sent with processMode='updateBatch', the API validates the request and creates a transaction record in GURFEED and GURTRNH upon successful validation.

• A create request sent with processMode='updateImmediate', the API validates the request and creates a journal voucher transaction record in FGBJVCD and GURTRNH upon successful validation.

 POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/general-ledger-transactions-12.1.0/general-ledger-transactions.yaml

---

### General Ledger Transactions 12.2.0 - Create a new resource

• A create request sent with processMode='updateBatch', the API validates the request and creates a transaction record in GURFEED and GURTRNH upon successful validation.

• A create request sent with processMode='updateImmediate', the API validates the request and creates a journal voucher transaction record in FGBJVCD and GURTRNH upon successful validation.

 POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

parameters.description:
### Person  
A reference to the person assigned a room.
```
/housing-assignments?criteria={"person": {"id": $id}}
```
### Academic Period  
The academic period associated with the housing assignment.
```
/housing-assignments?criteria={"academicPeriod": {"id": $id}}
```
### Status  
The status of the room assignment.
```
/housing-assignments?criteria={"status": {$status}}
```
### Start On  
The date the housing assignment starts.
```
/housing-assignments?criteria={"startOn:": {$startOn}}
```
### End On  
The date the housing assignment ends.
```
/housing-assignments?criteria={"endOn:": {$endOn}}
```

---

### Housing Assignments 16.0.0 - Create a new resource in SLRRASG

A housing assignment will be created with a POST request in SLRRASG.

Note:
• When academicPeriod is not sent in the request, depending on the 'MIN' and 'MAX' values defined in the DERIVE.TERM_RULE integration configuration setting, the API uses either the DERIVE_MIN_TERM or DERIVE_MAX_TERM delivered in GORRSQL to derive the effective term of the housing request application. Please refer to 'Housing and meal plan APIs' section in Banner Ethos API handbook for more details.

• An active housing request must exist for the person and term for a create request to be processed.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/housing-assignments-16.0.0/housing-assignments.yaml

---

```
post.summary: Institution Jobs 12.0 - Create a new resource in NBRJOBS
post.description:
### Institution Jobs 12.0 - Create a new resource in NBRJOBS

Creates a new job assignment record for an active employee in NBRJOBS(base), NBRBJOB(detail) and NBRJLBD(labor distributions) tables with a POST request.

Note: 

To create a new job assignment

• The person id sent in the request should be an active employee.

• The position id sent in the request should be an active position.

• If the person is already assigned this position, then the suffix for the new job sent in the request must be unique.

• If the person sent in the request has already a primary job, then the primary job must be changed to secondary before a new primary job request is sent.

• The effective date of the job should not be earlier than the current hire date in PEBEMPL.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/institution-jobs-12.0.0/institution-jobs.yaml

---

### Institution Jobs 12.1.0 - Create a new resource in NBRJOBS

Creates a new job assignment record for an active employee in NBRJOBS(base), NBRBJOB(detail) and NBRJLBD(labor distributions) tables with a POST request.

Note: 

To create a new job assignment

• The person id sent in the request should be an active employee.

• The position id sent in the request should be an active position.

• If the person sent in the request has already a primary job, then the primary job must be changed to secondary before a new primary job request is sent.

• The effective date of the job should not be earlier than the current hire date in PEBEMPL.

• The suffix sent in the request has a corresponding record in NBRJOBS table, a new effective dated record for the person id and position id is added to NBRJOBS base table.

• If the suffix is not sent in the request and if there are no job assignments in NBRJOBS table, then a new job assignment will be created with "00" suffix.

• If the suffix is not sent in the request and if there are job assignments in NBRJOBS table, then a new job assignment will be created with the suffix value incremented.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/institution-jobs-12.1.0/institution-jobs.yaml
```

/institution-positions?criteria={"endOn":"1993-08-01"}

```
get.summary: Ledger Activities 11.0 - Return all resources from FGBTRND and FGRBAKO
get.description:
### Ledger Activities 11.0 - Return all resources from FGBTRND and FGRBAKO

Returns all posted and unposted transactions in Banner so that external systems can consume these activities for reporting, to build ledgers, different statements. Operating and general ledger transactions are retrieved from FGBTRND table and unposted transactions are retrieved from FGRBAKO table.

### Paginated Load
  - If the offset is not provided OR offset = ‘0’, the API returns the records for current fiscal year with count information.
  - If any other offset other than ‘0’ is provided, the API does not return the count information.
  - Only operating and general ledger transactions from FGBTRND are displayed.
  - If the API configuration setting LEDGER.EXCLUDE_CONTROL_ACCT = Y, the API will exclude the posted (FGBTRND) transactions that have control accounts associated i.e. internal account type = 30.
  - This API references ‘accounting-string-component-values v15 API’ for accounting string component value GUIDs. 
  - Records with FGBTRND_LEDGER_IND = E are excluded



  
### Bulk Load
  - If you are loading the data using bulk load feature set up in Data Access, this API returns all posted and unposted transactions for last 5 fiscal years.
  - Posted transactions from FGBTRND table of operating and general ledger type are displayed and unposted transactions from FGRBAKO are displayed.
  - Records with FGBTRND_LEDGER_IND = E are excluded
  - This API references ‘accounting-string-component-values v15 API’ for accounting string component value GUIDs.
  - If the API configuration setting LEDGER.EXCLUDE_CONTROL_ACCT = Y, the API excludes posted (FGBTRND) transactions that have control accounts associated i.e., internal account type = 30.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/ledger-activities-11.0.0/ledger-activities.yaml

---

### Paginated Load
  - If the offset is not provided OR offset = ‘0’, the API returns the records for current fiscal year with count information.
  - If any other offset other than ‘0’ is provided, the API does not return the count information.
  - Only operating and general ledger transactions from FGBTRND are displayed.
  - If the API configuration setting LEDGER.EXCLUDE_CONTROL_ACCT = Y, the API will exclude the posted (FGBTRND) transactions that have control accounts associated i.e. internal account type = 30.
  - This API references ‘accounting-string-component-values v15 API’ for accounting string component value GUIDs. 
  - Records with FGBTRND_LEDGER_IND = E are excluded


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/ledger-activities-11.1.0/ledger-activities.yaml
```

/meal-plan-assignments?criteria={"academicPeriod": {"id": $id}}

```
The status of the meal plan assignment.
```
/meal-plan-assignments?criteria={"status": $status}

```
Note:

• An active meal plan request must exist for the person and term for a create request to be processed.

get.description:
### Organizations 6.0 - Returns resources from SPRIDEN

Returns a paged listing of all the organization records from SPRIDEN where SPRIDEN_ENTITY_IND ='C'.

The API retrieves all the active addresses associated with the organization from SPRADDR table. The addresses property is published with only the address GUID, addressLines and place details are not published.

parameters.description:
### Vendor  
Returns all organizations with ‘vendor’ role.
```
/organizations?role=vendor
```
### Credential type and Credential value  
Returns organization for the credentialType and credentialValue passed. Both credentialType and credentialValue are required. Only ‘credentialType=bannerId’ is supported.
```
/organizations?credentialType=bannerId&credentialValue=A00000718
```

post.summary: Organizations 6.0 - Create a new resource in SPRIDEN
post.description:
### Organizations 6.0 - Create a new resource in SPRIDEN

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new organization record in SPRIDEN where SPRIDEN_ENTITY_IND ='C'.

Below are the API behavior details for addresses property on a create request:

Addresses

- The create request should be sent with 'addresses.address.addressLines' and 'addresses.address.place' properties to create a new organization address . A create request sent without addressLines will be rejected with an error message.
- The create request should be sent with valid 3166-1-alpha-3 country ISO code, 3166-2 region and subregion ISO codes. The create request sent without ISO codes will be rejected with an error message.
```

```
parameters.description:
### Document Number  
The document number associated with the payment transaction (i.e. check number, payment transaction number).
```
/payment-transactions?criteria={"documentNumber":"T1234567"}
```
### Payments For Invoice Reference Document  
Returns all payment transactions for the purchase order ID passed
```
/payment-transactions?criteria={"paymentsFor":[{"document":{"referenceDocument":{"purchaseOrder":{"id":"5a1a56c6-0d50-4867-b196-2403c28137c1"}}}}]}
```
Returns all payment transactions for the blanket purchase order ID passed.
```
/payment-transactions?criteria={"paymentsFor":[{"document":{"referenceDocument":{"blanketPurchaseOrder":{"id":"5a1a56c6-0d50-4867-b196-2403c28137c1"}}}}]}
```
Filter on payments for reference document recurringVoucher and purchasingArrangement are not supported

parameters.description:

Filter to return payment transactions by document type and ID.
```
/payment-transactions?document={"document":{"type":"invoice","id":"637995e8-a008-4e4c-93bc-72ab1ddd479e"}}
```

get.description:
### Payroll Deduction Arrangements 7.0 - Returns resources from PDRBDED

Returns all records from PDRBDED that have deduction codes either with each pay period of month or first pay period of the month, and with calculation rule = 10 or 12 or 13. For a PDRBDED record, the deduction in PDRDEDN for the SYSDATE will be retrieved. But if there is no deduction available for current date, then the latest (max effective dated) record will be retrieved.
```

```
post.summary: Payroll Deduction Arrangements 7.0 - Create a new resource in PDRBDED
post.description:
### Payroll Deduction Arrangements 7.0 - Create a new resource in PDRBDED

Creates a payroll deduction arrangement in PDRBDED.

Note:
• The API supports create requests with by sending either commitment type (pledge, recurring donation or membership dues) OR deduction type ID.
• If commitment type (pledge, recurring donation or membership dues) is sent in a create request, appropriate deduction types should be mapped in API configuration settings for PDA.COMMITMENT.PLEDGE, PDA.COMMITMENT.RECURRDONATION and PDA.COMMITMENT.MEMBERDUES. These deduction codes should have the calculation rule type of 10, 12 or 13. 
• Pay period occurrence with first pay period of the month (monthlyPayPeriods = 1) and each pay period of month (interval = 1) are only supported.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/payroll-deduction-arrangements-7.0.0/payroll-deduction-arrangements.yaml

parameters.description: Version/media type accepted by this Banner/Ethos endpoint.

put.summary: Payroll Deduction Arrangements 7.0 - Update the requested resource from PDRBDED
put.description:
### Payroll Deduction Arrangements 7.0 - Update the requested resource from PDRBDED

Updates a payroll deduction arrangement with the passed in identifier.

Note:

• If an update request is sent with the supplied startOn date not equal to the existing begin date on the PDRBDED record, the API process this request as a change to the overall arrangement start date and cannot be earlier than the employee’s last paid date.
• If an update request has only change to effective date and there is no change to any other data of this arrangement such as status, amount, then the PUT API will delete the previously existing arrangement closely matching the effective date of the record that needs to change. But will hold the original GUID in memory and create a new PDRDEDN record thereby returning the original GUID in the response. 
• If an update request is sent with cancelled or withdrawn or rejected request, the payroll deduction arrangement will be terminated and the response will display the record status as terminated.


Updatable fields are : status, amountPerPayment.value, totalAmount.value changeReason and startOn 


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/payroll-deduction-arrangements-7.0.0/payroll-deduction-arrangements.yaml
```

post.summary: Person Emergency Contacts 1.0.0 - Create a new resource in SPREMRG
post.description:
### Person Emergency Contacts 1.0.0 - Create a new resource in SPREMRG

Creates a new person emergency contact record in SPREMRG.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.


A maximum of 9 emergency contacts are allowed to be created for a person. A create request sent for a person with 9 emergency contacts already existing in SPREMRG will be rejected with an error message.

For every person emeregency contact record created in SPREMRG table, priority in SPREMRG_PRIORITY should be populated. The Priority field is not identified in this data model and requires an assumption that the first record created on SPREMRG for a person will require a Priority of '1' to be inserted by the API. Subsequent emergency contact records for the same person will require a check to identify the first available priority number between '1' to '9' to be defaulted as SPREMRG_PRIORITY by the API.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/person-emergency-contacts-1.0.0/person-emergency-contacts.yaml

get.summary: Person External Education 1.0.0 - Returns resources
get.description:
### Person External Education 1.0.0 - Returns resources

Returns a paged listing of person external education details where high school records are retrieved from SORHSCH table where institution type is 'H', prior college records from SORPCOL table where institution type is 'C' and transfer institution records from SHRTRIT table where institution type is 'C'.

The person-external-educations API is part of Integration application, however some of the Banner tables (SORHSCH and SHRTRIT) supporting these APIs are part of Banner Student. Customers without Banner Student license would only see the records for prior college from SORPCOL table.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new person external education high school record in SORHSCH and prior college record in SORPCOL. Creating a transfer institution record is not supported.

The person-external-educations API is part of Integration application, however the Banner table for high school SORHSCH is part of Banner Student. Customers without Banner Student license would not be allowed to created high school records. A request sent to create a high school record would be rejected with an error.

The properties classSize, classPercentile, classRank and graduationDetails properties are not supported for prior college. Create request sent with these properties will be rejected with an error message.

get.summary: Person External Education Credentials 1.0.0 - Returns resources
get.description:
### Person External Education Credentials 1.0.0 - Returns resources

Returns a pages listing of person external education credentials details where high school diploma records are retrieved from SORHSCH table with institution type as 'H', prior college degree records from SORDEGR table where institution type is 'C' and transfer institution degree records from SHRTRAM table where institution type is 'C'.

The person-external-education-credentials API is part of Integration application, however some of the Banner tables (SORHSCH and SHRTRAM) supporting these APIs are part of Banner Student. Customers without Banner Student license would only see the records for prior college from SORDEGR  table.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/person-external-education-credentials-1.0.0/person-external-education-credentials.yaml

The person-external-education-credentials API is part of Integration application, however some of the Banner tables (SORHSCH and SHRTRAM) supporting these APIs are part of Banner Student. Customers without Banner Student license would only see the records for prior college from SORDEGR  table.

post.description:
### Person External Education Credentials 1.0.0 - Create a new resource

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new person external education credential record.

For a create request with high school diploma, the existing person-external-educations record in SORHSCH is updated with diploma details. Prior college degree records are created in SORDEGR . Creating a credential record for transfer institution is not supported.

The person-external-education-credentials API is part of Integration application, however the Banner table for high school SORHSCH is part of Banner Student. Customers without Banner Student license would not be allowed to created high school records. A request sent to update a high school record with diploma would be rejected with an error.

The properties - disciplines, performanceMeasure, classSize, classPercentile, classRank and thesisTitle are not supported for high school. Create request sent with these properties will be rejected with an error message.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/person-external-education-credentials-1.0.0/person-external-education-credentials.yaml

---

Creates a new person external education credential record.

For a create request with high school diploma, the existing person-external-educations record in SORHSCH is updated with diploma details. Prior college degree records are created in SORDEGR . Creating a credential record for transfer institution is not supported.

The person-external-education-credentials API is part of Integration application, however the Banner table for high school SORHSCH is part of Banner Student. Customers without Banner Student license would not be allowed to created high school records. A request sent to update a high school record with diploma would be rejected with an error.

The properties - disciplines, performanceMeasure, classSize, classPercentile, classRank and thesisTitle are not supported for high school. Create request sent with these properties will be rejected with an error message.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of resources requesting for this result set. Default page limit is 500 and upper limit is 500.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The 0 based index for a collection of resources for the page requested.

parameters.name: criteria
parameters.description:
### Title  
Returns all persons records with title equals the value passed. Filter is done only on the current name records (SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null).
```
/persons?criteria={"names":[{"title":"Mr."}]}
```
### First Name  
Returns all persons records whose first name starts with the value passed. Filter is done only on the current name records (SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null).
```
/persons?criteria={"names":[{"firstName":"James"}]}
```
### Middle Name  
Returns all persons records whose middle name contains the value passed. Filter is done only on the current name records (SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null).
```
/persons?criteria={"names":[{"middleName":"Emory"}]}
```
### Last Name Prefix  
Returns all persons records with last name prefix equals the value passed. Filter is done only on the current name records (SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null).
```
/persons?criteria={"names":[{"lastNamePrefix":"Van"}]}
```
### Last Name  
Returns all persons records whose last name starts with the value passed. Filter is done only on the current name records (SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null).
```
/persons?criteria={"names":[{"lastName":"Abbot"}]}
```
### Role  
Returns all persons for the role passed.
```
/persons?criteria={"roles":[{"role":"instructor"}]}
```
### Credentials  
Returns all persons for the credential type and value passed
```
/persons?criteria={"credentials":[{"type":"bannerId","value":"A00000718"}]}
```
### Alternative Credentials  
Returns persons for the alternative credentials passed. Both alternative credential type and value are required.
```
/persons?criteria={"alternativeCredentials":[{"type":{"id":"6cc4a853-2ff4-4ef3-9595-5d3eddcbbbcd"},"value":"DEANNE"}]}
```
### Email Address  
Returns all persons who have the email address passed. Filter will search for all active email records with email types mapped in GORICCR setting EMAILS.EMAILTYPE.
```
/persons?criteria={"emails":[{"address":"sample@ellucian.xyz"}]}
```

parameters.name: personFilter
parameters.description:
### Person Filter  
Returns all persons for the person population selection filter id passed.
```
/persons?personFilter={"personFilter":"6729a17e-3dfa-4517-95df-acdf160c24ab"}
```
```
/persons?personFilter={"personFilter":{"id":"cb3ebfe9-4a31-4933-a504-04d110413a29"}}
```

post.summary: Persons 12.0 - Create a new resource in SPRIDEN
post.description:
### Persons 12.0 - Create a new resource in SPRIDEN

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new person record in SPRIDEN.

Minimum required properties for a POST request: id, names.firstName, names.lastName

Below are the API behavior details for names, ethnicities and credentials properties on a create request:

Names

- Banner requires one name to be 'current' i.e. SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null. When one name is sent in the create request, person record is created in SPRIDEN with this name as current name.
- When multiple names are sent in the create request, a name with preference = preferred will be considered as current. If preference is not sent with any name then a name without a name type is considered as current. If both preference and name without name type is not sent, then the 'PERSON.NAMES.HIERARCHY' API configuration setting that defines the hierarchy of the name type is considered to decide which name is considered current.
- When a name with legal name type is sent without the first and last name, the API processes the create request and stores the name as full legal name in SPBPERS_LEGL_NAME field
- When a name with favored name type is sent, the API processes the create request by creating SPRIDEN record and additionally populates the preffered first name in SPBPERS_PREF_FIRST_NAME field
- Full name is not a stored value and will be ignored if sent in the create request

Ethnicities

- If the value mapped in API configuration setting 'PERSON.ETHNICITY.FIELDS.USED' is 'C' then the API considers the hispanic and nonHispanic ethnicity categories defined in GORGUID table and stores the person ethnicity in 'STVETHN_ETHN_CDE' field
- If setting in API configuration setting 'PERSON.ETHNICITY.FIELDS.USED' is 'E' then the API considers the ethnicity records from STVETHN table and stored the person ethnicity in 'SPBPERS_ETHN_CODE' field

Credentials

- SSN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is US or USA, the SSN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SSN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SSN
- SIN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is CA or CAN, the SIN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SIN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SIN
- Tax Identification Number - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is other than US or USA and CA or CAN, the taxIdentificationNumber value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is USA or CAN, the value is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_TIN


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/persons-12.0.0/persons.yaml

---

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

If preference is not sent with any name then a name without a name type is considered as current. If both preference and name without name type is not sent, then the 'PERSON.NAMES.HIERARCHY' API configuration setting that defines the hierarchy of the name type is considered to decide which name is considered current.
- When a name with legal name type is sent without the first and last name, the API processes the create request and stores the name as full legal name in SPBPERS_LEGL_NAME field
- When a name with favored name type is sent, the API processes the create request by creating SPRIDEN record and additionally populates the preffered first name in SPBPERS_PREF_FIRST_NAME field
- Full name is not a stored value and will be ignored if sent in the create request

- If setting in API configuration setting 'PERSON.ETHNICITY.FIELDS.USED' is 'E' then the API considers the ethnicity records from STVETHN table and stored the person ethnicity in 'SPBPERS_ETHN_CODE' field

If the home institution is any other country then the SSN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SSN
- SIN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is CA or CAN, the SIN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SIN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SIN
- Tax Identification Number - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is other than US or USA and CA or CAN, the taxIdentificationNumber value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is USA or CAN, the value is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_TIN

### Persons 12.2.0 - Create a new resource in SPRIDEN

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new person record in SPRIDEN.

Minimum required properties for a POST request: id, names.firstName, names.lastName

Below are the API behavior details for names, ethnicities and credentials properties on a create request:

Names

- Banner requires one name to be 'current' i.e. SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null. When one name is sent in the create request, person record is created in SPRIDEN with this name as current name.
- When multiple names are sent in the create request, a name with preference = preferred will be considered as current. If preference is not sent with any name then a name without a name type is considered as current. If both preference and name without name type is not sent, then the 'PERSON.NAMES.HIERARCHY' API configuration setting that defines the hierarchy of the name type is considered to decide which name is considered current.
- When a name with legal name type is sent without the first and last name, the API processes the create request and stores the name as full legal name in SPBPERS_LEGL_NAME field
- When a name with favored name type is sent, the API processes the create request by creating SPRIDEN record and additionally populates the preffered first name in SPBPERS_PREF_FIRST_NAME field
- Full name is not a stored value and will be ignored if sent in the create request

Ethnicities

- If the value mapped in API configuration setting 'PERSON.ETHNICITY.FIELDS.USED' is 'C' then the API considers the hispanic and nonHispanic ethnicity categories defined in GORGUID table and stores the person ethnicity in 'STVETHN_ETHN_CDE' field
- If setting in API configuration setting 'PERSON.ETHNICITY.FIELDS.USED' is 'E' then the API considers the ethnicity records from STVETHN table and stored the person ethnicity in 'SPBPERS_ETHN_CODE' field

Credentials

- SSN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is US or USA, the SSN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SSN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SSN
- SIN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is CA or CAN, the SIN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SIN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SIN
- Tax Identification Number - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is other than US or USA and CA or CAN, the taxIdentificationNumber value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is USA or CAN, the value is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_TIN

### Persons 12.7.0 - Create a new resource in SPRIDEN

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

Creates a new person record in SPRIDEN.

Minimum required properties for a POST request: id, names.firstName, names.lastName

Below are the API behavior details for names, ethnicities and credentials properties on a create request:

Names

- Banner requires one name to be 'current' i.e. SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND = null. When one name is sent in the create request, person record is created in SPRIDEN with this name as current name.
- When multiple names are sent in the create request, a name with preference = preferred will be considered as current. If preference is not sent with any name then a name without a name type is considered as current. If both preference and name without name type is not sent, then the 'PERSON.NAMES.HIERARCHY' API configuration setting that defines the hierarchy of the name type is considered to decide which name is considered current.
- When a name with legal name type is sent without separate first and last name fields but with a single fullName property, the API processes the create request and stores that value as the full legal name in the SPBPERS_LEGL_NAME field.
- When a name with the favored name type is submitted with a detail ID, the API processes the create request by creating an SPRIDEN record with change indicator 'N' in the Alternative Identification tab of the SPAIDEN form. When a name with the favored name type is submitted without a detail ID, the new GORICCR settings take effect.
 
    Setting: PERSONS.FAVORED.NAMETYPE
    
    Title: “Favored name preferential configuration”
    
    Sequence: 1
    
    Value: NameType (NT), PreferredName (PN)
  
    By default, the value is set up as NT (NameType). In this case the detail ID is automatically derived based on the API configuration PERSON.NAMES.NAMETYPE, and the API processes the create request by creating an SPRIDEN record with change indicator 'N' in the Alternative Identification tab of the SPAIDEN form.

    However, if the value is set to PN (PreferredName) and the detail ID is not provided in the request, we do not derive the detail ID. Instead, update only the SPBPERS fields below, where applicable:

    - SPBPERS_PREF_FIRST_NAME

    - SPBPERS_PREF_MIDDLE_NAME

    - SPBPERS_PREF_LAST_NAME

- Full name is not a stored value and will be ignored if sent in the create request

Ethnicities

- If the value mapped in API configuration setting 'PERSON.ETHNICITY.FIELDS.USED' is 'C' then the API considers the hispanic and nonHispanic ethnicity categories defined in GORGUID table and stores the person ethnicity in 'STVETHN_ETHN_CDE' field
- If setting in API configuration setting 'PERSON.ETHNICITY.FIELDS.USED' is 'E' then the API considers the ethnicity records from STVETHN table and stored the person ethnicity in 'SPBPERS_ETHN_CODE' field

Credentials

- SSN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is US or USA, the SSN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SSN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SSN
- SIN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is CA or CAN, the SIN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SIN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SIN
- Tax Identification Number - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is other than US or USA and CA or CAN, the taxIdentificationNumber value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is USA or CAN, the value is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_TIN

Gender

- genderMarker.id property will be taken as precedence for POST/PUT if genderMarker along with gender value is sent in the request. The gender property would be deprecated in a future release.

Addresses

- addresses.id property will be supported in GET method, however,the persons API requires that address details be provided in full within a POST/PUT request. Supplying only the address.id is not recognized as valid input.
- When the requirement is to update other person attributes without changing the address, the address object can be omitted from the request body. This will allow the update to complete successfully.
- Where the requirement is to add a new address while retaining existing ones, the current API design requires all address entries — both existing and new — to be included in the request body. If only the new address is submitted, previously existing ones will be inactivated. 
- If the requirement is to modidy/update any existing persons addresses, we can now leverage addresses API instead of persons API.

post.summary: Persons 12.0 - Returns resources from SPRIDEN
post.description:
### Persons 12.0 - Returns resources from SPRIDEN

Queries for the requested resource using a set of attributes provided in the POST request body. Please note the path to the server is overriden to use /qapi/{resource} in the URL and not /api/{resource}.

This API allows to search for persons based on given search criteria. The search criteria can be specified in the request body.

- The V12 version of person search QAPI supports :
- Search based on all the name types.
- Search based on first name, last name, bannerId, gender, SSN, date of birth, emails.

- Searching person while having multiple name types together in the request body is not supported. The appropriate error will be thrown.
- First name and last name are required.
- ‘PERSON.MATCHRULE’ setting should be configured with the matching source code (GTVCMSC_CODE) in the API Management Center. The QAPI performs person duplicate check based on the rules defined for this matching source code in the common matching source rules form GORCMSC.


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/persons-12.0.0/persons.yaml

- Searching person while having multiple name types together in the request body is not supported. The appropriate error will be thrown.
- First name and last name are required.
- ‘PERSON.MATCHRULE’ setting should be configured with the matching source code (GTVCMSC_CODE) in the API Management Center. The QAPI performs person duplicate check based on the rules defined for this matching source code in the common matching source rules form GORCMSC.

put.summary: Persons Credentials 11.0 - Update the requested resource
put.description:
### Persons Credentials 11.0 - Update the requested resource

Updates the person credentials for an existing SPRIDEN record. Note that the credentials.type of bannerUdcId cannot be changed.

Below are the API behavior details for credentials property on an update request:

Credentials

- SSN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is US or USA, the SSN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SSN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SSN
- SIN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is CA or CAN, the SIN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SIN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SIN
- Tax Identification Number - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is other than US or USA and CA or CAN, the taxIdentificationNumber value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is USA or CAN, the value is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_TIN


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/persons-credentials-11.0.0/persons-credentials.yaml

---

### Persons Credentials 11.1.0 - Update the requested resource

Updates the person credentials for an existing SPRIDEN record. Note that the credentials.type of bannerUdcId cannot be changed.

Below are the API behavior details for credentials and alternateCredentials properties on an update request:

Credentials

- SSN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is US or USA, the SSN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SSN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SSN
- SIN - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is CA or CAN, the SIN value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is any other country then the SIN value in the create request is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_SIN
- Tax Identification Number - If the ISO nation code configured in STVNATN_SCOD_CODE_ISO for the home institution nation code in GUBINST_NATN_CODE is other than US or USA and CA or CAN, the taxIdentificationNumber value sent in the create request is stored in the Banner baseline field SPBPERS_SSN. If the home institution is USA or CAN, the value is stored in the Ethos integration field SPBPERSS_TIN

Alternate Credentials

- The alternateCredentials property is used to process credentials stored in GORADID table that are not mapped as Elevate ID, Colleague ID or Colleague User Name in the API configuration settings CREDENTIALS.COLLEAGUE_ID, CREDENTIALS.COLLEAGUE_USERNAME, CREDENTIALS.ELEVATE_ID
- Updates to Elevate ID, Colleague ID and Colleague User Name in GORADID table should be done through credentials property. Any update request to these credentials sent as part of this property will be rejected with an error message

post.summary: Prospect Opportunities Submissions 1.0.0-beta - Create a new resource in SRBRECR
post.description:
### Prospect Opportunities Submissions 1.0.0-beta - Create a new resource in SRBRECR

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

In addition to the required properties defined in the data model, the following are required for a POST request: entryAcademicPeriod

Creates a prospect opportunity record in SRBRECR table, creates associated curriculum records in SORLCUR, and associated field of study – major, minor and concentration records in SORLFOS. Only active and current RECRUIT SORLCUR records are created. Institution-enabled validations are performed based on the configurations in curriculum checkings, SOACTRL page and the curriculum rules, SOACURR page.

The API response conforms to the prospect-opportunities data model.

### Purchase Orders 11.0 - Returns resources from FPBPOHD and FGBENCH

All the FGBENCH records for travel type purchase orders are retrieved. All the FPBPOHD records with FPBPOHD_ORIGIN_CODE = 'Banner' or 'SELF_SERVICE' and FPBPOHD_PO_TYPE_IND = 'R' for procurement type purchase orders are retrieved and all the FPBPOHD records with FPBPOHD_ORIGIN_CODE = EPROCUREMENT and FPBPOHD_PO_TYPE_IND = R for eProcurement type purchase orders are retrieved.

If the procurement or eProcurement type purchase order is created from the requisition, the requisition reference for each line item (lineItems.reference.document.requisition) is retrieved in the response.

post.summary: Purchase Orders 10.0 - Create a new resource
post.description:
### Purchase Orders 10.0 - Create a new resource

Create a new resource

Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/purchase-orders-10.0.0/purchase-orders.yaml

---

### Purchase Orders 11.0 - Create a new resource in FPBPOHD and FGBENCH

Creates a new purchase order record. A create request sent with 'type' as procurement or eProcurement will create a purchase order record in FPBPOHD. A create request sent with 'type' as travel will create a purchase order record in FGBENCH.

For travel type purchase order only one line item is supported.

Procurement/eProcurement type purchase order:
• The API supports creating an inProgress and completed purchase order document. 

• If a create request is sent with status = inProgress, the API creates a purchase order with 'inProgress' status. 

• If a create request is sent with status other than 'inProgress', the API creates a completed purchase order and returns the status as 'outstanding' if the document is approved. For a completed and not approved document, the API returns the status as 'notApproved'.

• If requisition is sent in the purchase orders line items(lineItems.reference.document.requisition), the API converts the requisition to eProcuremnet type purchase order.

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.

In addition to the required properties defined in the data model, the following are required for a POST request: lineItems.accountDetails.allocation


Source OpenAPI file: ethosapis/BannerEedmAPIs/purchase-orders-11.0.0/purchase-orders.yaml

---

POST requests must include a nil GUID value ("00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000") for the root id property.
